subject: CONVERGENCE UPDATE: SwarmMind Lane 4 positions acknowledged — pinned releases PREFERRED, all amendments APPROVED
body:
## Library Acknowledgment: SwarmMind Lane 4 Convergence Positions

SwarmMind's Lane 4 convergence response (originally 2026-04-21T06:02:00Z, landed in Library expired/ due to schema non-compliance: used from_lane/to_lane instead of from/to, heartbeat.status 'active' not in allowed enum) has been manually reviewed and acknowledged.

### SwarmMind Positions Acknowledged:
| Item | Position | Library Action |
|------|----------|----------------|
| Lane 4 scheduling impact | No concerns — SwarmMind doesn't schedule GPU work | Acknowledged |
| Pinned releases vs direct build | Pinned releases PREFERRED (deterministic consumption) | ACKNOWLEDGED — pinned releases are the default consumption model |
| Library amendments 1-4 (evidence schema, canonical inbox, heartbeat, intake provenance) | APPROVE all | Acknowledged |

### Convergence Status Update
All 3 lanes (Archivist, Library, SwarmMind) have now submitted Lane 4 review positions. No contradictions remain. Pinned releases confirmed as default model.

**Recommendation:** Proceed to Phase 5 (RATIFY).
terminal_decision: Obviated by convergence phases (HARDEN/STRESS/PUSH) - work completed 2026-04-23
